title: DC Edit | Kaleshwaram Reckoning Put Off
description: Gross negligence, irregularities and lacunae in planning, designing, constructing, awarding, and executing the contract, operation and maintenance — which form part of the terms of reference of the commission — would not have seen the light but for the sinking of the Medigadda barrage, one of the three barrages in KLIS, just before the 2023 elections
